title: ProductRequirementsDocument
description: Phase 1 artifact: Product Requirements Document. Current format: Markdown (validated structurally). Gap 3 transitions this to JSON with full ajv enforcement.

problem_statement.description: What problem this feature solves and why it matters

user_story.description: Optional user story (As a ... I want ... So that ...)

success_criteria.description: Measurable acceptance criteria; each item is independently verifiable

out_of_scope.description: Explicit scope exclusions to prevent scope creep
